boundary_name, lower_age_range, upper_age_range
<1, 0, 1
1_4, 1, 5
5_9, 5, 10
10_14, 10, 15
15_19, 15, 20 
20_24, 20, 25 
25_29, 25, 30 
30_34, 30, 35 
35_39, 35, 40 
40_44, 40, 45 
45_49, 45, 50 
50_54, 50, 55 
55_59, 55, 60 
60_64, 60, 65 
65_69, 65, 70 
70_74, 70, 75 
75_79, 75, 80 
80_84, 80, 85 
85_89, 85, 90
90_94, 90, 95 
95<, 95, 120
